  "text": "The major kubelet components owned by sig-node in kubernetes/kubernetes (v1.32.0) are:\n\n1. **Pod Lifecycle Manager** (`pkg/kubelet/pleg/` and `pkg/kubelet/pod_workers.go`):\n   - `pkg/kubelet/pleg/pleg.go` defines the `PodLifecycleEventGenerator` interface and `PodLifecycleEvent` struct, which are the core abstractions for pod lifecycle events.\n   - `pkg/kubelet/pleg/generic.go` implements `GenericPLEG`, the primary polling-based pod lifecycle event generator.\n   - `pkg/kubelet/pleg/evented.go` implements `EventedPLEG`, an event-driven alternative using CRI events.\n   - `pkg/kubelet/pod_workers.go` implements `podWorkers` (implementing the `PodWorkers` interface), which manages the goroutines that handle pod sync operations (`SyncPod`, `TerminatePod`).\n   - `pkg/kubelet/lifecycle/` contains admission handlers and predicates controlling pod admit/reject decisions.\n\n2. **Container Runtime Interface (CRI) Client** (`staging/src/k8s.io/cri-client/pkg/`):\n   - `staging/src/k8s.io/cri-client/pkg/remote_image.go` implements `remoteImageService` (via `NewRemoteImageService`), the gRPC client for the CRI ImageService.\n   - The `pkg/kubelet/kuberuntime/` package builds on top of the CRI client with `kubeGenericRuntimeManager` (in `kuberuntime_manager.go`) which is the kubelet's high-level container runtime abstraction.\n\n3. **Volume Manager** (`pkg/kubelet/volumemanager/`):\n   - `pkg/kubelet/volumemanager/volume_manager.go` defines the `VolumeManager` interface and `volumeManager` struct — the central component that ensures volumes are mounted/unmounted for pods.\n   - `pkg/kubelet/volumemanager/reconciler/reconciler.go` implements the `Reconciler` that periodically reconciles actual vs. desired volume state.\n   - `pkg/kubelet/volumemanager/populator/desired_state_of_world_populator.go` implements the `DesiredStateOfWorldPopulator` that keeps the desired state up to date from pod specs.\n   - `pkg/kubelet/volumemanager/cache/` contains actual and desired state-of-world caches.\n\n4. **Device Plugin Manager** (`pkg/kubelet/cm/devicemanager/`):\n   - `pkg/kubelet/cm/devicemanager/types.go` defines the `Manager` interface for the device plugin framework.\n   - `pkg/kubelet/cm/devicemanager/manager.go` implements `ManagerImpl`, the concrete device plugin manager that handles device plugin registration, resource allocation, and pod device assignment.\n   - `pkg/kubelet/cm/devicemanager/endpoint.go` manages the gRPC connection to each registered device plugin.\n   - `pkg/kubelet/cm/devicemanager/pod_devices.go` tracks per-pod device allocations.\n   - `pkg/kubelet/cm/devicemanager/plugin/v1beta1/` contains the device plugin API client and server implementations.\n   - The `pkg/kubelet/pluginmanager/` package provides the general plugin registration mechanism (PluginManager/pluginManager) used by device plugins and CSI drivers to register with the kubelet."

## Kubelet Component Ownership Map (sig-node, kubernetes/kubernetes v1.32.0)

### 1. Pod Lifecycle Manager
- **`pkg/kubelet/pleg/pleg.go`** — `PodLifecycleEventGenerator` interface and `PodLifecycleEvent` struct
- **`pkg/kubelet/pleg/generic.go`** — `GenericPLEG` (polling-based implementation)
- **`pkg/kubelet/pleg/evented.go`** — `EventedPLEG` (CRI-event-driven implementation)
- **`pkg/kubelet/pod_workers.go`** — `podWorkers` managing pod sync goroutines
- **`pkg/kubelet/lifecycle/`** — Admission handlers and predicates

### 2. Container Runtime Interface (CRI) Client
- **`staging/src/k8s.io/cri-client/pkg/remote_runtime.go`** — `remoteRuntimeService` gRPC client
- **`staging/src/k8s.io/cri-client/pkg/remote_image.go`** — `remoteImageService` gRPC client
- **`pkg/kubelet/kuberuntime/kuberuntime_manager.go`** — `kubeGenericRuntimeManager` (high-level CRI abstraction)
- Supporting files in `pkg/kubelet/kuberuntime/` (container, sandbox, gc, image management)

### 3. Volume Manager
- **`pkg/kubelet/volumemanager/volume_manager.go`** — `VolumeManager` interface + `volumeManager` struct
- **`pkg/kubelet/volumemanager/reconciler/`** — Reconciliation of actual vs. desired state
- **`pkg/kubelet/volumemanager/populator/`** — Desired state population from pod specs
- **`pkg/kubelet/volumemanager/cache/`** — State caches

### 4. Device Plugin Manager
- **`pkg/kubelet/cm/devicemanager/types.go`** — `Manager` interface
- **`pkg/kubelet/cm/devicemanager/manager.go`** — `ManagerImpl` (concrete implementation)
- **`pkg/kubelet/cm/devicemanager/endpoint.go`** — Per-plugin gRPC endpoint
- **`pkg/kubelet/cm/devicemanager/plugin/v1beta1/`** — Plugin API client/server
- **`pkg/kubelet/pluginmanager/plugin_manager.go`** — General `PluginManager` for device plugin registration

`pkg/kubelet/pod_workers.go` implements `podWorkers` (implementing the `PodWorkers` interface), which manages the goroutines that handle pod sync operations (`SyncPod`, `TerminatePod`).\n   - `pkg/kubelet/lifecycle/` contains admission handlers and predicates controlling pod admit/reject decisions.\n\n2. **Container Runtime Interface (CRI) Client** (`staging/src/k8s.io/cri-client/pkg/`):\n   - `pkg/kubelet/volumemanager/populator/desired_state_of_world_populator.go` implements the `DesiredStateOfWorldPopulator` that keeps the desired state up to date from pod specs.\n   - `pkg/kubelet/volumemanager/cache/` contains actual and desired state-of-world caches.\n\n4. **Device Plugin Manager** (`pkg/kubelet/cm/devicemanager/`):\n   - `pkg/kubelet/cm/devicemanager/types.go` defines the `Manager` interface for the device plugin framework.\n   - `pkg/kubelet/cm/devicemanager/manager.go` implements `ManagerImpl`, the concrete device plugin manager that handles device plugin registration, resource allocation, and pod device assignment.\n   - `pkg/kubelet/cm/devicemanager/endpoint.go` manages the gRPC connection to each registered device plugin.\n   - `pkg/kubelet/cm/devicemanager/pod_devices.go` tracks per-pod device allocations.\n   - `pkg/kubelet/cm/devicemanager/plugin/v1beta1/` contains the device plugin API client and server implementations.\n   -
